description: Style Note If comfort's on your mind, these fabulous sandals from red tape transport you to heavenly bliss! Stylish and super comfy, this pair is ruggedly crafted for casual wear. Team it with jeans or shorts and step out in style. Product Details Leather upper with vertical and horizontal straps and backstrap Well cushioned footbed TPU outsole with branched lugs Material and Care Leather Use a leather brush to remove dirt Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
